01, Meta-bar

Header for playbook, site, landing. Used at the top of long-form content (single row, mono uppercase).

Paula Silva | Software Global Black Belt
02, Cover slide

First slide of a deck or presentation. Same structure as paulasilvatech version, with email replacing the 3 social icons.

Paula Silva | Software Global Black Belt
Context Platform Stack

Four layers of engineering discipline for agentic AI at enterprise scale.

An executive diagnostic deck for enterprises where AI pilots stall before production.

Author Paula Silva
Role Software Global Black Belt
Contact paulasilva@microsoft.com
Date 2026-04-24
03, Final slide

Closing slide of a deck. Dark background (#141414), role in mono uppercase, email as contact card.

Start with H1. Commit to the platform before the agents.

Building the future of software development with AI and Agentic DevOps.

Paula Silva | Software Global Black Belt
Contact paulasilva@microsoft.com
paulasilva · 2026-04-24

What to validate

  • Logo </> SVG keeps the same shape and proportions as paulasilvatech, recolored to the Microsoft 4-color palette.
  • Role text Paula Silva | Software Global Black Belt in mono font, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.16em.
  • No mention of Microsoft Americas, AI-Native Software Engineer, GitHub, LinkedIn, or agenticdevopsplatform.com anywhere.
  • Tagline remains Building the future of software development with AI and Agentic DevOps.
  • Email paulasilva@microsoft.com is the only contact channel, rendered as a mailto link.
  • Cover layout keeps 4-column meta grid: Author, Role, Contact, Date.
  • Final slide is dark (#141414), mirrors the cover with role in mono uppercase and email as a bordered contact card.
  • All tokens (colors, fonts, spacing) remain shared with paulasilvatech. Only the identity strings and contact changed.
